name: Wild Yak
conservationEfforts: Chang Tang Nature Reserve in Tibet protects core habitat. Anti-poaching enforcement improved. Chinese government expanded protected areas on the Tibetan Plateau.
description: The wild ancestor of the domestic yak, standing nearly 2 meters tall at the shoulder. They live at elevations of 4,000-6,000 meters on the Tibetan Plateau, where temperatures drop to -40°C.
